name: Chili Dogs
recipeInstructions:
1. Microwave frankfurters uncovered on high (100%) until warm, 30 to 45 seconds.
2. Place 1 frankfurter in each bun on serving plate; spoon chili onto frankfurters.
3. Microwave uncovered until chili is hot, 1 to 1 1/2 minutes.
Note:
If preparing just one chili dog, microwave uncovered 30 to 45 seconds. To Make Coney Dogs, Just before serving sprinkle fresh chopped onion on the top of the heated chili and serve.
